gsd.reason: scripts/gsd prompt programming-loop returned unknown GSD command; planning/TDD/verification artifacts are maintained manually

events.detail: Created #154 GSD/TDD/verification artifacts before production edits.
DirectRead root-relative endpoint test failed with the request under /api/v1/accounts/{account_id}/platform instead of the configured origin root.
Added root-relative direct-read origin handling and covered the remaining official Chatwoot GET operations with bounded JSON direct-read commands.
Engine/commandrunner direct-read tests, Chatwoot connectorgen metrics, Chatwoot conformance, connector validation, docs validation, website connector data test, and git diff --check passed.
gofmt -w cmd internal, go vet ./..., go test ./..., go build ./cmd/pm, and make verify passed.
